F1_F2.reasoning: Reference and all non-reference grids meet the support criteria.

F1_F4.reasoning: F1/F4 has no precision-supported coupling grid and remains open under low cofire power.

F2_F4.reasoning: F2/F4 rule blocks promotion because at least one grid is underpowered.

grids.construction_rule: x_i * (1 + 0.05 * Uniform[-1, 1]), clamped to [0.01, 0.99], sorted, deduplicated
grids.name: coarse_perturbation

grids.construction_rule: x_i * (1 + 1e-4 * Uniform[-1, 1]), clamped to [0.01, 0.99], sorted, deduplicated
grids.name: fine_perturbation

grids.construction_rule: 137 samples drawn from Uniform(0.01, 0.99), sorted, deduplicated
grids.name: independent_uniform
